## Maturity tag

- [ ] `provisional` — no external review yet (author only)
- [ ] `reviewed` — ≥1 external practitioner / scientist beyond the author has reviewed (list in `meta.reviewed_by`)
- [ ] `calibrated` — NOT user-claimable; reserved for Goable's L3 outcome-data pipeline output. Schema validation will reject this without a `meta.calibration` block.
